---
title: "CosMx CRC dataset - Analysis"
author: "Samuel Gunz"
date:  last-modified
format: 
    html:
      toc: true
      self-contained: true
      highlight-style: github
      code-line-numbers: true
output-dir: "../docs/"
---
# Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
#| echo: false
library("SpatialExperiment")
library("sosta")
library("ggplot2")
library("tidyr")
library("dplyr")
library("sf")
library("smoothr")
library("spdep")
library("ggspavis")
library("mumosa")
library("BiocParallel")
library("scater")
library("ggrastr")
bpparam <- MulticoreParam(6)

theme_set(theme_bw())
```

Set up for plotting

```{r}
# Specific color mapping - source: https://github.com/HelenaLC/WTx-TVA/blob/d75d0cd20a9880f11c1368e37ba39660e3f2e82c/code/_utils.R#L4
# custom order
.fw <- facet_wrap(~factor(typ, c("110_REF", "110_TVA1", "110_TVA2",
                                 "110_TVA3", "110_CRC")))
.pal_sub <- c(epi="gold2", imm="cyan2", str="magenta2")

```

```{r}
# Specific color mapping - source: https://github.com/HelenaLC/WTx-TVA/blob/d75d0cd20a9880f11c1368e37ba39660e3f2e82c/code/_utils.R#L4
typCols <- c(
  "110_REF" = "seagreen",
  "110_TVA1" = "dodgerblue",
  "110_TVA2" = "royalblue",
  "110_TVA3" = "slateblue",
  "110_CRC" = "tomato"
)
```

Read in data

```{r}
spe <- readRDS("~/data_no_backup/CosMx_TVA/110.rds")
spe <- toSpatialExperiment(spe, spatialCoordsNames = c("CenterX_global_px", "CenterY_global_px"))
# for later reconstruction
spe$foo <- "foo"
```


```{r}
# selected fov of interest
ls <- c(105, 106, 107, 108, 109, 110, 111,
        133, 134, 135, 136, 137, 138, 139,
        96, 97, 98,
        #25, 
        26,
        27, 28, 29, 30,
        #382, 383, 384,
        46, 47, 48, 49,
        50, 51, 
        #52,
        59, 60, 61, 62, 63, 64, 65,
        92, 93, 94, 95)

gc()
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 9

cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = typ)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.15, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=4))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = typCols)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(lv1)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(y = -CenterX_global_px, x = CenterY_global_px, color = typ)) +
  ggrastr::rasterise(geom_point(size = 0.01, stroke = 0), dpi = 300) + 
  coord_equal() +
  # scale_color_manual(values = .pal_sub,  labels = c("epithelial", "immune", "stromal")) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=3))) +
  labs(color = "") +
  scale_color_manual(values = typCols) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
ggsave("../misc/slide110.pdf", width = 5, height = 2.85)
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(lv1)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = lv1)) +
  ggrastr::rasterise(geom_point(size = 0.01, stroke = 0), dpi = 300) + 
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = .pal_sub,  labels = c("epithelial", "immune", "stromal")) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=3))) +
  labs(color = "") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
ggsave("../misc/slide110cells.pdf", width = 3, height = 6.5)
```

# Structures per ROIs

```{r}
spe$typ |> unique()
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
int <- shapeIntensityImage(
  spe[,!is.na(spe$typ)],
  marks = "lv1",
  imageCol = "typ",
  imageId = c("110_TVA1"),
  markSelect = "epi"
)
```


```{r}
params <- estimateReconstructionParametersSPE(
    spe,
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "typ",
    markSelect = "epi",
    plotHist = TRUE,
    dim = 750
)
```


```{r}
mean(params$thres)
mean(params$bndw)
```

```{r}
idx <- spatialCoords(spe)[,1] < 60000 & 
  spatialCoords(spe)[,1] > 45000 & 
  spatialCoords(spe)[,2] < 60000 & 
  spatialCoords(spe)[,2] > 45000
```


```{r}
resSub <- reconstructShapeDensitySPE(
    spe[,idx],
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "foo",
    markSelect = "epi",
    bndw = 60,
    thres = 8.5E-5,
    dim = 500
)
```


```{r}
cs1 <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(pals::alphabet(26))(dim(resSub)[1])

resSub |>
    mutate(struct = (cs1)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = struct, color = struct)) +
    guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cs1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cs1) +
    theme_void()

ggsave("../misc/structs.pdf", width = 3, height = 3)
```


```{r}
#| column: screen
#| out-width: 100%
#| fig-width: 6
#| fig-heigth: 6

spe[,idx] |>
  (\(x) x[, colData(x)$fov %in% ls])() |>
  (\(x) cbind(spatialCoords(x), colData(x)))() |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  filter(!is.na(lv1)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = lv1)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, stroke = 0) +
  coord_equal() +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  geom_sf(
    data = resSub,
    fill = NA,
    color = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    # this is important
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = .pal_sub) +
  theme_void()
```
# All structs

```{r}
structs <- reconstructShapeDensitySPE(
    spe,
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "foo",
    markSelect = "epi",
    bndw = 50,
    thres = 9E-5,
    dim = 2500
)
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cs1 <- sample(unname(pals::alphabet(26)), dim(structs)[1], replace = TRUE)

structs |>
    mutate(struct = (cs1)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = struct, color = struct)) +
    guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cs1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cs1) +
    theme_void()
```

## Assign cells to strucutres

```{r}
library("parallel")
df <- .SPE2df(spe, "foo", colNames = TRUE)
#ls <- split(df, as.factor(df[, imageCol]))

blocks <- split(df, ceiling(seq_len(nrow(df)) / 10000))


res <- mclapply(blocks, function(dfSel) {
    structsSel <- structs
    spatialCoordsSf <- st_as_sf(dfSel[, c(1, 2)], coords = c(colnames(dfSel)[1], 
        colnames(dfSel)[2]))
    n <- st_intersects(spatialCoordsSf, structsSel, sparse = FALSE)
    n_list <- apply(n, 1, function(x) which(x == TRUE)[1])
    res <- ifelse(n_list == 0, NA, structsSel[["structID"]][n_list])
    return(data.frame(colnamesSPE = dfSel$colnamesSPE, structAssign = res))
}, mc.cores = 5)

rd <- do.call("rbind", res)
out <- rd$structAssign
names(out) <- rd$colnamesSPE
```


```{r}
colData(spe)$structAssign <- out[colnames(spe)]
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 25
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE & fov %in% ls) |> 
  #dplyr::filter(!is.na(structAssign)) |> 
  dplyr::filter(lv1 == "epi") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = structAssign)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(cs1)) +
  guides(colour = "none") +
    geom_sf(
    data = resSub,
    fill = NA,
    color = "navy",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    # this is important
    linewidth = 0.75
  )
```

# Struct metrics

```{r}
shapeMetrics <- totalShapeMetrics(structs)
shapeMetricsSub <- totalShapeMetrics(resSub)
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 6
#| fig-heigth: 6
cbind(resSub, t(shapeMetricsSub)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = fibreWidth, color = fibreWidth)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "A") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "A") +
  theme_void()
ggsave("../misc/fibWid.pdf", width = 3, height = 2.25)
```

# Filter structs

```{r}
(fq <- quantile(shapeMetrics["Area",], c(0.4)))
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(resSub, t(shapeMetricsSub)) |>
  filter(Area > fq[1]) |> 
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = Area, color = Area)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C")
```

```{r}
filts <- names(which(shapeMetrics["Area", ] > fq[1]))
spe$structAssignFilt <- ifelse(spe$structAssign %in% filts, spe$structAssign, NA)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 20
cs1 <- sample(unname(pals::alphabet(26)), dim(structs)[1], replace = TRUE)


cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE & fov %in% ls) |> 
  #dplyr::filter(!is.na(structAssign)) |> 
  dplyr::filter(lv1 == "epi") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = structAssignFilt)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(cs1)) +
  guides(colour = "none") +
    geom_sf(
    data = resSub,
    fill = NA,
    color = "navy",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    # this is important
    linewidth = 0.75
  )
```
# Metrics

```{r}
# Specific color mapping - source: https://github.com/HelenaLC/WTx-TVA/blob/d75d0cd20a9880f11c1368e37ba39660e3f2e82c/code/_utils.R#L4
sm <- shapeMetrics |> 
  t() |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  tibble::rownames_to_column("structAssign")

df <- colData(spe)[!is.na(spe$structAssignFilt),] |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  left_join(sm, by = "structAssign" )
```

```{r}
colData(spe) |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  select(lv2) |>
  pull() |> 
  unique() |> 
  as.character() -> namesLv2

lv2Cols <- pals::trubetskoy(length(namesLv2))
names(lv2Cols) <- sort(namesLv2)
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-heigth: 8
df |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(lv2, fibreWidth),
             y = fibreWidth, fill = lv2)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.85, key_glyph="point") +
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) +
  labs(fill = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = lv2Cols) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21, stroke=0, size=4),
                           ncol = 1)) -> p2
p2
ggsave("../misc/bp-fibW.pdf", plot = p2, width = 7, height = 4.5)
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 5
df |> 
  filter(!is.na(typ)) |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  filter(!is.na(structAssignFilt)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(typ, fibreWidth), y = fibreWidth, fill = typ)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.85, key_glyph="point") +
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) +
  labs(fill = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = typCols) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21, stroke=0, size=4))) -> p1

p1
ggsave("../misc/bp-fibW-reg.pdf", plot = p1, width = 3, height = 4)
```

```{r}
# custom order
.fw <- facet_wrap(~factor(typ, c("110_REF", "110_TVA1", "110_TVA2",
                                 "110_TVA3", "110_CRC")))
```



```{r}
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 5
df |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  group_by(structAssign) |> 
  reframe(medianTrj = median(trj), medianFibreWitdh = median(fibreWidth), typ = typ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = medianFibreWitdh, y = medianTrj, color = typ)) +
    ggrastr::rasterise(geom_point(size = 1, stroke = 0), dpi = 300)  +
  labs(color = "") +
  scale_color_manual(values = typCols) +
  labs(x = "median fibre width", y = "median trajectory") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black")  +
  guides(color=guide_legend(override.aes=list(size = 4))) -> p3

p3
```

Collect for figure

```{r}
psub <- p1 + p2 + p3
ggsave("../misc/psub.pdf", plot = psub, width = 12, height = 4)
```


```{r}
df |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  group_by(structAssign) |> 
  reframe(medianTrj = median(trj), medianFibreWitdh = median(fibreWidth), typ = typ) -> seltr

#cor.test(seltr$medianTrj, seltr$medianFibreWitdh)
cor.test(seltr$medianTrj, seltr$medianFibreWitdh, method = "spearman")
```

```{r}
df |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  group_by(structAssign) |> 
  reframe(medianPanCK = median(Mean.PanCK), medianFibreWitdh = median(fibreWidth), typ = typ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = medianFibreWitdh, y = asinh(medianPanCK/200), color = typ)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(color = "") +
  scale_color_manual(values = typCols) +
  labs(title = "Median panCK vs. mean fibre width per structure") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black")
```

# Parameter analysis

```{r}
shapeIntensityImage(
    spe[,idx],
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "foo",
    markSelect = "epi",
    imageId = "foo",
    dim = 750
)
```

```{r}
resSub <- reconstructShapeDensitySPE(
    spe[,idx],
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "foo",
    markSelect = "epi",
    bndw = 85,
    thres = 7.5E-5,
    dim = 750
)
```


```{r}
cs1 <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(pals::alphabet(26))(dim(resSub)[1])

resSub |>
    mutate(struct = (cs1)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = struct, color = struct)) +
    guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cs1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cs1) +
    theme_void()
```

```{r}
bdl <- c(60, 70, 80, 90, 100, 110, 120)
thrl <- c(2E-5, 3E-5, 4E-5, 5E-5, 6E-5, 7E-5, 8E-5, 9E-5, 1E-4)

dfr <- c()

for (bd in bdl) {
    cat(paste0("bdw: ", bd, "\n"))
    for (thr in thrl) {
        cat(paste0("thr: ", thr, "\n"))
        resSub <- reconstructShapeDensitySPE(
            spe[, idx],
            marks = "lv1",
            imageCol = "foo",
            markSelect = "epi",
            bndw = bd,
            thres = thr,
            dim = 500
        )
        
        res <- stCalculateShapeCurl(st_geometry(resSub))$fibreWidth
        mn <- mean(res)
        md <- median(res)
        sdr <- sd(res)
        nr <- length(res)
        
        out <- data.frame(bandwidth = bd,
                          threshold = thr,
                          mean_value = mn,
                          median_value = md, 
                          sd_value = sdr, 
                          number_structs = nr)
        dfr <- rbind(dfr, out)
    }
}
dfr
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 5
dfr |>
  pivot_longer(-c(bandwidth, threshold)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = bandwidth, y = value, color = name)) +
  geom_point(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(name ~ threshold) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(y = "", color = "")
```

# SessionInfo

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
